title: Science Kidz Mega Gemstone Dig Kit - 20 Real Life Gems & Crystals - Gemstones Excavation Kits For Kids - Gem Stones Digging Kit Set - Dig For Gems, Stones, Crystals & Rocks
features: DISCOVER GEMSTONE TREASURES - Give kids the chance to dig for hidden, real-life gems and crystals. Finish up with a beautiful set of gemstones from around the world. Use the Full-Colour Learning Guide to match up each gemstone and learn all about them

FIND 20 AMAZING GEMSTONES & CRYSTALS - Use the dig tools to find the hidden gems, including Amethyst, Tiger’s Eye, Quartz Crystal, Red Jasper, Topaz, White Jade, and more. Also includes FREE velvet bag to keep your collection safe!

FUN & EDUCATIONAL ACTIVITY - Includes everything you need to keep kids engaged and learning for hours, including a dig brick packed with 20 gemstones, chisel, brush, magnifying glass and full-colour learning guide
INCLUDES FULL-COLOUR LEARNING GUIDE - The detailed learning guide illustrates each gemstone and provides a fascinating insight with details such as how gemstones are formed and their characteristics
EASY FOR KIDS - The extra large dig brick has been specially designed for kids so it is not to hard to excavate but still challenging enough and rewarding when they unearth that special stone
